[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Whisteer''' was a corrupt [[Police officer/Legends|port guard]] in [[Janusar]], [[Ranklinge]]. He was shot and killed by [[Korlo Brightwater]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
